				}
			}

		    }

				always = no
			}
			allowed_civil_war = {
				always = yes
			}
			on_remove = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_idea = SOV_the_new_union_idea
					}
					swap_ideas = {
						remove_idea = SOV_the_new_union_idea
						add_idea = SOV_the_new_union_2_idea
					}
				}
				else = {
					add_ideas = SOV_the_new_union_idea
				}
			}
			removal_cost = -1
			modifier = {
				political_power_factor = -0.15
				consumer_goods_factor = 0.075
				production_factory_max_efficiency_factor = -0.05
				production_factory_efficiency_gain_factor = -0.05

				conversion_cost_civ_to_mil_factor = -0.25
				conversion_cost_mil_to_civ_factor = -0.25
				industrial_development_monthly = 0.01
			}
			on_remove = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { has_country_flag = remove_ideas_flag }
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							has_completed_focus = SOV_national_4_year_plan
						}
					add_ideas = SOV_upgrade_industrial_production_4_year_plan_idea #лаки, сосал мне?
					}
					else_if = {
						limit = {
							has_completed_focus = SOV_oligarchic_connections
						}
					add_ideas = SOV_upgrade_industrial_production_oligarchic_idea
					}
					else = {
						set_temp_variable = {
							var = industrial_development_var_temp
							value = 0.15
						}
					add_industrial_development = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
